interpretation.why_not_complete: These rows summarize local virtual rollouts under an enriched/resource-adjusted official-CSV-loop chain. They are useful report evidence, but they are not official checkpoints, not unpatched official rollouts, not paper Fig. 5/Fig. 6 videos, and not real-robot results.
